name: AnalysisArea
summary: The AnalysisArea class contains information related to analysis areas.

constructors.name: AnalysisArea
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisArea class.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes an analysis area. Method is not implemented yet.

methods.name: GetAreaHoles
methods.summary: Gets the area holes of the analysis area.

methods.name: GetInnerPositions
methods.summary: Gets the inner positions of the analysis area.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies an analysis area. Method is not implemented yet.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis area. The AnalysisModelName and ID have to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisDesignCode
properties.summary: Gets or sets the design code of the analysis area.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: AnalysisType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis type of the analysis area.

properties.name: Area
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area polygon of the analysis area.

properties.name: AreaHoles
properties.summary: Gets or sets the area holes of the analysis area.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: InnerPositions
properties.summary: Gets or sets the inner positions of the analysis area.

properties.name: Label
properties.summary: Gets or sets the label of the analysis area.

properties.name: Material
properties.summary: Gets or sets the material of the analysis area.

properties.name: Profile
properties.summary: Gets or sets the profile of the analysis area.

properties.name: RigidDiaphragm
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rigid diaphragm of the analysis area.

properties.name: Thickness
properties.summary: Gets or sets the thickness of the analysis area.
